overall.description: Gameplay footage from a driving game (Mafia III) showing a first-person vehicle perspective crossing a large steel truss bridge and driving through 1960s urban streets, eventually stopping at an intersection. The scene features period-appropriate cars, commercial buildings, and clear sunny weather.

white delivery van driving in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives on a wide asphalt road approaching a massive steel truss bridge under clear skies. A black sedan is followed ahead while a white van passes on the left. The bridge towers dominate the forward view.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels across the steel truss bridge with the structural framework creating geometric shadows on the road. The black sedan remains ahead as the bridge spans across water, with city buildings becoming visible as the exit approaches.

segments.scene_description: After exiting the bridge, the vehicle drives through a sunny urban commercial district with 1960s architecture. The black sedan continues ahead as the camera passes by storefronts, billboards, and tree-lined sidewalks.

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches a busy intersection with a modern office building on the right. Pedestrians are crossing the street, causing the vehicle to stop at the crosswalk. A light green vintage sedan waits on the left while the black sedan stops ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person vehicle perspective that transitions from a wide open approach to a massive bridge into the dense, sunny streets of a 1960s urban district. It begins on a wide asphalt road under clear skies, following a black sedan while a white van passes on the left as the towering steel truss bridge looms ahead. As the vehicle crosses the bridge, the structural framework casts rhythmic geometric shadows across the road before the view opens up to reveal the city skyline across the water. The scene then shifts into a commercial district, gliding past period architecture, billboards, and tree-lined sidewalks in the wake of the black sedan. Finally, the movement slows as the vehicle enters a busy intersection with a modern office building on the right, coming to a complete stop at a crosswalk behind the black sedan and beside a light green vintage car.
